case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $1,150.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF DAMON GRAYSON IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-08-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF DAMON GRAYSON IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 22, 2009 FOR HEARING ON THE MATTER. MR. GRAYSON WAS GIVEN BY THE COURT AN OPPORTUNITY TO FILE HIS OPPOSITION SINCE HE WAS IN CUSTODY AT THE TIME IT WAS DUE ON MARCH 25, 2009. MR. GRAYSON WILL FILE HIS OPPOSITION ON OR BEFORE APRIL 16 AND TO GIVE COURTESY COPY TO DEPT. 301 NO LATER THAN APRIL 16. THE PETITIONER MAY FILE A REPLY BY APRIL 20, 2009. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
